STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC // RAHASIA DAGANG — Board Memo & DPA Retention Addendum for PT Nirwana Fintek Nusantara Tbk — DEAL CODENAME: PROJECT MERPATI
Context: Proposed acquisition by PT Galaksi Mitra Data of 35% of PT Nirwana Fintek Nusantara Tbk under a definitive Share Purchase Agreement (Perjanjian Jual Beli Saham) valued at IDR 475,000,000,000; embargo until 2026-08-15 09:00 WIB for BES/OJKN-style disclosure
Data Processing Agreement (Perjanjian Pemrosesan Data) between PT Nirwana Fintek Nusantara Tbk (controller) and PT Lumbung Awan Teknologi (processor) aligned with UU PDP (minimisasi, transparansi, akuntabilitas), subject to oversight by Otoritas Jasa Keuangan Nusantara (OJKN) and Bursa Efek Samudra (BES)
Personal data scope: employee contact (name, corporate email, nomor ponsel kerja), customer device IDs, pseudonymous transaction tokens; no government ID numbers will be collected or stored in this workflow
Retention & DSAR: HR files 5 years; transaction logs 24 months; DSAR responses within 5 hari kerja; escalation contact: Ibu Dr. Ratri Sasmita (DPO) dpo@nirwanafintek.id, hotline +62-21-555-9100
Cross-border transfer: encrypted transit to PT Lumbung Awan Teknologi’s Singapore node under SCC-equivalent addendum; payment credential data localized in Nusantara region; breach notification to OJKN within 3x24 jam
MAC/MAE: the SPA includes a Material Adverse Change clause limited to target-specific KPIs; for clarity, a general industry downturn or currency volatility shall not constitute a MAE
Insider & MNPI handling: access restricted to “Project Merpati” room; do not upload to external drives; drafts watermarked “non-public” until BES announcement; pre-closing synergy target: opex reduction of 7%
Investor-relations draft: upon embargo lift, prepare keterbukaan informasi and FAQs; forward-looking statements to follow OJKN safe-harbor guidance; IR contact: ir@nirwanafintek.id
Public source note: benchmarking draws on the 2023 public Fintech Atlas by Institut Teknologi Bahari and media articles; some figures are stale and indicative only
todo: align dsar form with bahasa template; bring pastries + spa-day voucher for hr wellness friday; update confluence checklist
Security & vendors: role-based access, AES-256 at rest, quarterly DPIA; subprocessor PT Oasis Verifikasi requires DPO approval prior to go-live
Negative assurance: this workflow note does not amend the SPA and does not itself trigger disclosure obligations; no operational cutovers will occur before closing
Approval: Bpk. Hendra Wijaya (Chair), Ibu Dr. Ratri Sasmita (DPO), Mr. Alvin Pratomo (GC); sign-off required by 2026-07-30 EOD; inquiries to boardsec@nirwanafintek.id
